trans-unit.note: No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.

trans-unit.id: Open my most recent search in ${applicationName}
trans-unit.source: Open my most recent search in ${applicationName}
trans-unit.note: No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.

trans-unit.id: Show my most recent search in ${applicationName}
trans-unit.source: Show my most recent search in ${applicationName}
trans-unit.note: No comment provided by engineer.
No comment provided by engineer.
Bundle display name
Bundle name

trans-unit.source: If Callsheet can use your local network, it may be able to show links to what you're currently watching on the main screen. Enabling local network usage is completely optional. No data about your network is sent off your device.
trans-unit.target: Om Callsheet kan använda ditt lokala nätverk kan appen visa länkar till vad du tittar på just nu på huvudskärmen. Att tillåta användning av det lokala nätverket är helt frivilligt. Ingen data om ditt nätverk skickas från din enhet.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Local Network Usage Description
(No Comment)
(No Comment)
Product display price

trans-unit.id: %@ and %@ have not been in any films together.
trans-unit.source: %1$@ and %2$@ have not been in any films together.
trans-unit.target: %1$@ och %2$@ har inte varit med i några filmer tillsammans.

trans-unit.note: {Icon name} by {Icon artist}
Shown in the TV seasons carousel (on the TV show screen)
Shown in the TV seasons carousel (on the TV show screen)
How many episodes a person has been appeared in for a TV show, or how many episodes are in a TV season
How many episodes a person has been appeared in for a TV show, or how many episodes are in a TV season
Shown on the main/bottom bar when the user has fewer than 10 of their free searches left
Shown on the main/bottom bar when the user has fewer than 10 of their free searches left
The age of an actor right now. Part of a larger string. For example, "34 years old, 73 now"
Age of an actor who passed away during the run of a TV series. For example, "27 until their death in 2013 (age 31)"
The age of an actor at the time a piece of media was released.
The age of an actor at the time a piece of media was released.
How old a person was when they passed
The age of an actor at the time a piece of media was released.

trans-unit.id: A few more free ones please?
trans-unit.source: A few more free ones please?
trans-unit.note: Shown on the "Additional options" purchasing screen, offering the user five more free searches

trans-unit.id: A search result from the Search Media action. When provided, Media Type and ID are not needed.
trans-unit.source: A search result from the Search Media action. When provided, Media Type and ID are not needed.

trans-unit.note: Shown on the "Buy Now" button when asking for more free searches
Shown on the "Buy Now" button when asking for more free searches

trans-unit.id: Add or Remove From Other Lists
trans-unit.source: Add or Remove From Other Lists
trans-unit.target: Lägg till eller ta bort från andra listor

trans-unit.note: Accessibility label for a context menu item that lets a user add an object to a list
A kind of service to watch media on. Contrast with "Free", "Rent", "Buy", "Subscription"
Heading in Persnickety Preferences
When viewing a person, show their movie & TV crew jobs
Shown in the context of a semi-hidden debugging screen.
When viewing a person, show their movie & TV acting roles
Title for the row in settings that allows you to set the app's language
Example episode name shown in Spoiler Settings

trans-unit.id: Apple couldn't charge you for your subscription renewal. You will need to fix your payment and re-subscribe to continue to use Callsheet.
trans-unit.source: Apple couldn't charge you for your subscription renewal. You will need to fix your payment and re-subscribe to continue to use Callsheet.
trans-unit.target: Apple kunde inte debitera dig för din abonnemangsförnyelse. Du behöver uppdatera din betalmetod och prenumerera på nytt för att fortsätta använda Callsheet.
trans-unit.note: Shown in the subscription status screen @ callsheet://subs
Shown when clearing recent searches or search history
Shown in a popover explaining TV/movie scores
Screen in settings that lets you choose which quick links (Trivia, Technical Details, etc) are shown
How long episodes run in a single season of TV
Quick access link; awards that a film or show has won

trans-unit.id: Be a hero and support independent apps
trans-unit.source: Be a hero and support independent apps
trans-unit.target: Var en hjälte och stöd oberoende appar
trans-unit.note: Shown when trying to sell a subscription

trans-unit.id: Be like the many other beautiful people who have rated this version.
trans-unit.source: Be like the many other beautiful people who have rated this version.
trans-unit.target: Var som de många andra fantastiska personer som har betygsatt den här versionen.
trans-unit.note: Shown to try to encourage the user to rate the app
When a TV season started airing
When a TV season will start airing
Example role shown in Spoiler Settings
A kind of service to watch media on. Contrast with "Free", "Ads", "Rent", "Subscription"
Accessibility label for callsheet's icon in live activities

trans-unit.id: Callsheet couldn't parse the information from The Movie Database.
trans-unit.source: Callsheet couldn't parse the information from The Movie Database.
trans-unit.target: Callsheet kunde inte tolka informationen från The Movie Database.

trans-unit.id: Callsheet couldn't reach The Movie Database.
trans-unit.source: Callsheet couldn't reach The Movie Database.
trans-unit.target: Callsheet kunde inte nå The Movie Database.

trans-unit.id: Callsheet was built in Virginia by **[Casey Liss](https://www.caseyliss.com/)**.
trans-unit.source: Callsheet was built in Virginia by **[Casey Liss](https://www.caseyliss.com/)**.
trans-unit.target: Callsheet byggdes i Virginia av **[Casey Liss](https://www.caseyliss.com/)**.

trans-unit.note: Accessibility title of the menu item for all/movie/TV cast selection

trans-unit.id: Change what language Callsheet itself uses
trans-unit.source: Change what language Callsheet itself uses
trans-unit.note: Description for the row in settings that allows you to set the app's language
Shown in settings for the quick access link
Accessibility label for the quick access picker in Persnickety Preferences

trans-unit.id: Choose an icon that fits your aesthetic.
trans-unit.source: Choose an icon that fits your aesthetic.
trans-unit.target: Välj en ikon som passar din stil.
trans-unit.note: Subtitle for "Custom icons"; shown on the pre-sales screen to get users to subscribe

trans-unit.id: Choose between providing a result from another Callsheet action, or providing a Media Type & ID.
trans-unit.source: Choose between providing a result from another Callsheet action, or providing a Media Type & ID.

trans-unit.id: Choose spoiler-risky things to hide by default.
trans-unit.source: Choose spoiler-risky things to hide by default.
trans-unit.target: Välj de saker med spoilerrisk som ska döljas som standard.
trans-unit.note: Subtitle for a row in Settings

trans-unit.target: Välj vilka länkar som ska visas.
trans-unit.note: Description for the screen in Settings which lets you choose which quick links (Trivia, Technical Details, etc) are shown.

trans-unit.id: Choose which links you'd like available when using Callsheet.
trans-unit.source: Choose which links you'd like available when using Callsheet.
trans-unit.target: Välj vilka länkar du vill ha tillgängliga när du använder Callsheet.
trans-unit.note: Headline for the Select Links view

trans-unit.id: Choose which sections to show on the Discover screen.
trans-unit.source: Choose which sections to show on the Discover screen.
trans-unit.target: Välj vilka avsnitt som ska visas på Upptäck-skärmen.

trans-unit.note: Shown when clearing recent searches or search history

trans-unit.id: Connect to devices on your local network to show what's playing.
trans-unit.source: Connect to devices on your local network to show what's playing.
trans-unit.target: Anslut till enheter på ditt lokala nätverk för att visa vad som spelas.
trans-unit.note: Subtitle in Persnickety Preferences
Shown in the context menu for a pin
Shown as a header on the movie view for the mid- and post-credits scene icons
Persnickety Preferences header
Accessibility title of the menu item for all/movie/TV crew selection
Shown in Where to Watch if the current locale can't be found
Shown on the pre-sales screen to get users to subscribe
Help text shown on the screen that allows customization of the Discover view.
Dark theme (other options are "light" and "system")

trans-unit.id: Data provided by The Movie Database
trans-unit.source: Data provided by The Movie Database
trans-unit.target: Data tillhandahålls av The Movie Database

trans-unit.note: Used in the context of an "Are you sure?" prompt when deleting a pin

trans-unit.id:
Delete the list "%@"?
It currently has %lld pins.|==|plural.one
trans-unit.source:
Delete the list "%1$@"?
It currently has %2$lld pin.
trans-unit.target:
Ta bort listan “%1$@”?
Den innehåller för närvarande %2$lld objekt.

trans-unit.id:
Delete the list "%@"?
It currently has %lld pins.|==|plural.other
trans-unit.source:
Delete the list "%1$@"?
It currently has %2$lld pins.
trans-unit.target:
Ta bort listan “%1$@”?
Den innehåller för närvarande %2$lld objekt.

trans-unit.note: Button in the sheet/overlay when a random pin is selected; when tapped it will navigate to this item's details view.
Heading in Persnickety Preferences; this lets you choose which sections to show on the Discover screen.
Button shown in the sheet/overlay when a random pin is selected; when tapped it will clear the overlay.
Abbreviation for a TV episode; in English, short for "Episode".

trans-unit.id: Each TV show can have their own settings, set by tapping the `Hide` `Spoilers…` button when looking at a show or episode.
trans-unit.source: Each TV show can have their own settings, set by tapping the `Hide` `Spoilers…` button when looking at a show or episode.
trans-unit.target: Varje TV-serie kan ha sina egna inställningar, som du ställer in genom att trycka på knappen `Dölj` `Spoilers...` när du tittar på en serie eller ett avsnitt.

trans-unit.note: When a show or movie ends if you start it right now
When viewing a person, show all their cast & crew records
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
Shown in the context of a semi-hidden debugging screen.

trans-unit.id: Feedback emails are lovely to read!
trans-unit.source: Feedback emails are lovely to read!
trans-unit.note: Shown in Settings to try to get users to rate the app
Gender for a person that identifies as female

trans-unit.id: Fetches details about a movie, TV show, or person from TMDB.
trans-unit.source: Fetches details about a movie, TV show, or person from TMDB.

trans-unit.id: Fetches videos (trailers, teasers, clips, etc.) for a movie or TV show from TMDB. Returns a list of video results, each with a name, type, and URL.
trans-unit.source: Fetches videos (trailers, teasers, clips, etc.) for a movie or TV show from TMDB. Returns a list of video results, each with a name, type, and URL.

trans-unit.note: When viewing a person, show only their movie crew jobs
When viewing a person, show only their movie acting roles

trans-unit.id: Find a way to watch in:

trans-unit.target: Hitta ett sätt att titta på i:
trans-unit.note: Shown when choosing a country to use for Where to Watch (long version)
Shown in Settings
Shown in Settings

trans-unit.id: Force Callsheet's theme, or use the system one.
trans-unit.source: Force Callsheet's theme, or use the system one.
trans-unit.target: Välj Callsheets tema, eller använd systeminställningen.

trans-unit.note: A kind of service to watch media on. Contrast with "Ads", "Rent", "Buy", "Subscription"

trans-unit.target: Gratis saker varar inte för evigt.
trans-unit.note: Subtitle for "Unlimited searches"; shown on the pre-sales screen to get users to subscribe

trans-unit.id: Free, but you can only ask once. 😏
trans-unit.source: Free, but you can only ask once. 😏
trans-unit.target: Gratis, men du kan bara fråga en gång. 😏
trans-unit.note: Subtitle for the "A few more searches please" option on the "Additional options" purchasing screen

trans-unit.id: Hand your phone to someone knowing they **cannot mess up your photos**.
trans-unit.source: Hand your phone to someone knowing they **cannot mess up your photos**.
trans-unit.target: Lämna över din telefon till någon i vetskap om att de **inte kan förstöra dina bilder**.
trans-unit.note: Peek-a-View subtitle in Settings
Toggle for TV spoiler settings
Toggle for TV spoiler settings
Toggle for TV spoiler settings
Toggle for TV spoiler settings
Toggle for TV spoiler settings

trans-unit.id: How seasons and episodes are sorted.
trans-unit.source: How seasons and episodes are sorted.
trans-unit.note: Shown in Settings

trans-unit.source: Unlimited searches for a month. Auto-renews
trans-unit.target: Obegränsde sökningar för en månad. Förlängs automatiskt
trans-unit.note: Description for the monthly subscription in-app purchase; 45 characters or less
Name of the monthly subscription in-app purchase
The display name for the subscription group that contains Monthly, Yearly, Yearly Supporter, and Yearly Super-Supporter

trans-unit.source: Access to Callsheet for 1 year. Auto-renews
trans-unit.target: Tillgång till Callsheet i 1 år. Förlängs automatiskt
trans-unit.note: Description for the annual subscription in-app purchase; 45 characters or less
Name of the annual subscription in-app purchase
Description for the medium-cost annual subscription; 45 characters or less
Name of the annual subscription that is a bit more money than the normal one
Description for the maximum-cost annual subscription; 45 characters or less
Name of the maximum-cost annual subscription

trans-unit.id: If you play something using [Channels](https://getchannels.com/) or [Plex](https://plex.tv/) on another device, Callsheet can display that show or movie at the top of the Discover screen. [More info…](%@://%@)
trans-unit.source: If you play something using [Channels](https://getchannels.com/) or [Plex](https://plex.tv/) on another device, Callsheet can display that show or movie at the top of the Discover screen. [More info…](%1$@://%2$@)
trans-unit.target: Om du spelar något via [Channels](https://getchannels.com/) eller [Plex](https://plex.tv/) på en annan enhet, kan Callsheet visa det programmet eller filmen högst upp på Upptäck-skärmen. [Mer information…](%1$@://%2$@)

trans-unit.note: Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
Which browser to use for web links (the other option is "System Default")
Toggle whether or not to include people being credited as themselves, or simply as "Thanks", in cast/crew lists.
Header in Persnickety Preferences

Shown as a header in Settings; "Known For" in English
Shown in Settings

On cast list, display movies, shows, or movies & shows

trans-unit.id: Movies and TV shows will show one link for quick access. The others are available in the More menu.

trans-unit.note: Title for cast union view
Crew search prompt; I'll replace "%@" with the name of the media in question, so for the translation, please include "%@" where appropriate.
Cast search prompt; I'll replace "%@" with the name of the media in question, so for the translation, please include "%@" where appropriate.
Discover section (portion of the main screen) for episodes that have been released recently
Discover section (portion of the main screen) for movies that have been released recently
When setting sort order
Toolbar arrow to go forward a movie within a collection. Say, Empire Strikes Back → Return of the Jedi
Shown when a person has searched for something but no matching credits were found.
Shown when a person has no cast nor crew credits Shown when a person has no credits.
Shown when there's no data for new movies / new shows / etc
Default option for language/region override
Shown when a movie/show has no cast/crew
Shown when searching a list of credits, but no matches were found
Shown on the home screen
Shown when there's no data for Where to Watch
Generic "couldn't find anything for this query" message
Gender for a person that identifies as neither male nor female.

Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
A header on the home screen & a row in Settings; shows what is currently playing in Plex and/or Channels.

trans-unit.source: Opens Callsheet and repeats the most recent search.

trans-unit.source: Opens Callsheet to the list of your pinned items

trans-unit.target: Om du vill, kan du bidra ytterligare.

trans-unit.id: Or, you can have %lld more free search. Just this once.|==|plural.one

trans-unit.target: Eller, så kan du få %lld ytterligare gratis sökning. Bara denna gång.

trans-unit.id: Or, you can have %lld more free search. Just this once.|==|plural.other

Shown above Maskeraid & Peek‑a‑View

Subtitle for Persnickety Preferences in Settings
Quick access link

trans-unit.id: Parental guidance won't be shown for cast and crew.

trans-unit.target: Åldersrekommendationer kommer inte att visas för rollista och team.

Navigation title for Persnickety Preferences in Settings
Picker label for accessibility purposes, in Where to Watch
Noun, a pin/favorite
Title of the sheet/screen that explains pin icons
Shown in the list of pins screen

trans-unit.id: Pin your favorites for quick access.

trans-unit.target: Fäst dina favoriter för snabb access.

Discover section (portion of the main screen) for your pinned/favorited/saved items
Shown on the pre-sales screen to get users to subscribe

trans-unit.id: Pinned items are shown at the top of the main screen when you open Callsheet. You can pin movies, shows, or people.
trans-unit.source: Pinned items are shown at the top of the main screen when you open Callsheet. You can pin movies, shows, or people.
trans-unit.target: Fästa objekt visas högst upp på huvudskärmen när du öppnar Callsheet. Du kan fästa filmer, program eller personer.

trans-unit.note: In the context of different subscription/IAP plans

trans-unit.id: Please fix your billing issue as soon as possible using the App Store app in order to keep using Callsheet.
trans-unit.source: Please fix your billing issue as soon as possible using the App Store app in order to keep using Callsheet.
trans-unit.target: Vänligen uppdatera din betalmetod i AppStore-appen så snart som möjligt för att fortsätta använda Callsheet.
trans-unit.note: Shown in the subscription status screen @ callsheet://subs
Subtitle when collecting log entries to send

Discover section (portion of the main screen) for shows that are popular on TMDB right now

When a TV episode or movie was released in the past
When a TV episode or movie will be released

A kind of service to watch media on. Contrast with "Free", "Ads", "Buy", "Subscription"

Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
Heading for the total runtime of a TV episode
Abbreviation for a TV season; in English, short for "Season".

trans-unit.id: Same perks as all other plans
trans-unit.source: Same perks as all other plans
trans-unit.target: Samma förmåner som alla andra abonnemang.
trans-unit.note: Shown when trying to sell a subscription
As in, commit a pending change
Encouraging users to save money by purchasing a yearly subscription — "Save 17%"
A 0-100 score of the quality of a movie/show
Title of the Search History screen

trans-unit.id: Searches TMDB for movies, TV shows, and people matching the given query. Returns up to 20 results, each containing a TMDB ID, title, and media type.
trans-unit.source: Searches TMDB for movies, TV shows, and people matching the given query. Returns up to 20 results, each containing a TMDB ID, title, and media type.

trans-unit.note: Navigation title for the screen showing the seasons of a TV show; NOT spring/summer
Button shown when rearranging the Discover screen that allows the user to open a preview of Discover.
Title for the Select Links screen; this screen lets you customize which links are available when using Callsheet
Shown when choosing between cast & crew

trans-unit.id: Select between a movie or TV show. Persons do not have videos.
trans-unit.source: Select between a movie or TV show. Persons do not have videos.

trans-unit.id: Select between a movie, TV show, or person. When provided, you must also provide an ID, but a Result is not needed.
trans-unit.source: Select between a movie, TV show, or person. When provided, you must also provide an ID, but a Result is not needed.

trans-unit.note: Export preview
Accessibility label
Shown in an accessibility label

trans-unit.id: Show age information within credits lists. Ages are always shown for birth/death dates.
trans-unit.source: Show age information within credits lists. Ages are always shown for birth/death dates.
trans-unit.target: Visa åldersinformation i listor av medverkande. Ålder visas alltid för födelse-/dödsdatum.

trans-unit.id: Show movies, shows, or both in credit lists.
trans-unit.source: Show movies, shows, or both in credit lists.
trans-unit.target: Visa filmer, serier eller båda i listor av medverkande.
trans-unit.note: Persnickety Preferences subtitle
Shown when trying to sell a subscription

trans-unit.id: Show titles a person may be known from.

trans-unit.target: Visa titlar en person kan vara känd för.

trans-unit.note: Shown on the "Purchase now" row in Settings if purchasing is unavailable

trans-unit.id: Sorry, there was an error making your purchase. Please try it again later.
trans-unit.source: Sorry, there was an error making your purchase. Please try it again later.
trans-unit.target: Ledsen, ett fel uppstod vid ditt köp. Försök igen senare.

trans-unit.note: Title for the row in Settings to get you to the default Spoiler Settings
Shown on the "Buy Now" button when subscribing

trans-unit.id: Subscribers can change the app’s icon.
trans-unit.source: Subscribers can change the app’s icon.
trans-unit.note: Subtitle for the App Icon row in Settings
A kind of service to watch media on. Contrast with "Free", "Ads", "Rent", "Buy"
Title of a semi-hidden debugging view
Button to switch between lists when looking at the Favorites screen
System theme; this represents "the light/dark mode the device is in" (other options are always light and always dark)
Which browser to use for web links (the other option is "In-App Browser")
When viewing a pesron, show only their TV crew jobs
When viewing a person, show only their TV acting roles
On cast list, display movies, shows, or movies & shows

trans-unit.id: Tap-and-hold on the pin in the toolbar to see a menu with more actions. Use this as a quick way to add or remove this item from other lists.
trans-unit.source: Tap-and-hold on the pin in the toolbar to see a menu with more actions. Use this as a quick way to add or remove this item from other lists.
trans-unit.target: Tryck och håll inne på fäst objektet i verktygsfältet för att se en meny med fler alternativ. Använd detta som ett snabbt sätt att lägga till eller ta bort detta objekt från andra listor.

trans-unit.note: Quick access link

trans-unit.id: Thank you for trying out Callsheet. 💙
trans-unit.source: Thank you for trying out Callsheet. 💙
trans-unit.target: Tack så mycket för att du provar Callsheet. 💙

trans-unit.id: The identifier for this media item. When provided, you must also provide a Media Type, but a Result is not needed.
trans-unit.source: The identifier for this media item. When provided, you must also provide a Media Type, but a Result is not needed.

trans-unit.id: The Quick Access Link cannot be disabled.
trans-unit.source: The Quick Access Link cannot be disabled.
trans-unit.note: Message associated with the link that is currently the user's Quick Access Link; this link cannot be disabled.

trans-unit.id: The TMDB identifier for this media item.
trans-unit.source: The TMDB identifier for this media item.

trans-unit.id: The above open-source software helps make Callsheet possible. 💙
trans-unit.source: The above open-source software helps make Callsheet possible. 💙
trans-unit.target: Programvaran med öppen källkod ovan hjälper till att göra Callsheet möjligt. 💙

trans-unit.note: This is a caption under the "This item is pinned on the active list" line

trans-unit.id: The search term to look up on TMDB.
trans-unit.source: The search term to look up on TMDB.

trans-unit.note: Persnickety Preference for light/dark/system theme

trans-unit.id: There are a total of %lld lists and %lld pins.
trans-unit.source: There are a total of %1$lld lists and %2$lld pins.
trans-unit.target: Det finns totalt %1$lld listor och %2$lld objekt.

trans-unit.id: There is no watch information available for *%@*.
trans-unit.source: There is no watch information available for *%@*.
trans-unit.target: Det finns ingen tittarinformation tillgänglig för %@.

trans-unit.id: These often-redundant credits can be hidden by default.
trans-unit.source: These often-redundant credits can be hidden by default.
trans-unit.target: Dessa ofta överflödiga krediter kan döljas som standard.
trans-unit.note: Subtitle in Persnickety Preferences for the Self & Thanks toggle; the toggle's default is to show these credits.
Shown in spoiler settings for a particular show

trans-unit.id: This item is not pinned in any list
trans-unit.source: This item is not pinned in any list
trans-unit.target: Det här objektet är inte nålat på någon lista

trans-unit.id: This item is pinned on a different list
trans-unit.source: This item is pinned on a different list
trans-unit.target: Det här objektet är nålat på en annan lista

trans-unit.id: This item is pinned on the active list
trans-unit.source: This item is pinned on the active list
trans-unit.target: Det här objektet är nålat på den aktiva listan

trans-unit.id: Though it was written by me, Callsheet wouldn't be possible without the efforts of the following people:
trans-unit.source: Though it was written by me, Callsheet wouldn't be possible without the efforts of the following people:
trans-unit.target: Även om den skrevs av mig, skulle Callsheet inte vara möjlig utan insatserna från följande personer:

trans-unit.note: Crew search prompt in the context of a single person (not a movie/show/etc)
Cast search prompt in the context of a single person (not a movie/show/etc)
Main search prompt on the bottom bar!
Search prompt when viewing a person's entire (cast & crew) filmography
Shown in a popover when looking at a TV season
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view
Quick access link

trans-unit.id: Unfortunately, [The Movie Database](https://www.themoviedb.org/) does not yet support doing a union search for shows. I've asked them to add it; we'll see what happens!
trans-unit.source: Unfortunately, [The Movie Database](https://www.themoviedb.org/) does not yet support doing a union search for shows. I've asked them to add it; we'll see what happens!
trans-unit.target: Tyvärr stödjer [The Movie Database](https://www.themoviedb.org/) ännu inte att göra en sammanslagningssökning för serier. Jag har bett dem att lägga till det; vi får se vad som händer!
trans-unit.note: A "union" search answers the question "What movies were X and Y both in?". The word "Union" is likely not a great fit for other languages.
An unknown gender
Shown on the pre-sales screen to get users to subscribe
Header for titles a person will be in, but have not been released yet
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging view

trans-unit.id: Use the gripper to rearrange them.
trans-unit.source: Use the gripper to rearrange them.
trans-unit.target: Använd handtaget för att ordna om dem.
trans-unit.note: Help text shown on the screen that allows customization of the Discover view.

trans-unit.id: Use the toggles to turn sections on or off.
trans-unit.source: Use the toggles to turn sections on or off.
trans-unit.target: Använd växlarna för att slå på eller av avsnitt.
trans-unit.note: Help text shown on the screen that allows customization of the Discover view.
Header in Persnickety Preferences
Shown when waiting for a purchase to be approved (probably by a parent)
Shown when choosing a country to use for Where to Watch (short version)
Quick access link
Menu item when a user shows the context menu for a pin. This will show a popup that explains what the different pin icons mean.

trans-unit.id: What was that thing I looked up yesterday?
trans-unit.source: What was that thing I looked up yesterday?
trans-unit.target: Vad var det jag sökte på igår?
trans-unit.note: Subtitle for "Search history"; shown on the pre-sales screen to get users to subscribe
Quick access link

trans-unit.id: Which browser to use to open external links.
trans-unit.source: Which browser to use to open external links.
trans-unit.target: Vilken webbläsare som ska användas för att öppna externa länkar.

trans-unit.id: Which quick access link is shown.
trans-unit.source: Which quick access link is shown.
trans-unit.target: Vilken länk för snabbval som ska visas.
trans-unit.note: Shown as a subtitle for a row on Settings
Shown at the bottom of the "what movies are both of these actors in?" screen
Quick access link
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging screen
Shown in a semi-hidden debugging screen
Title shown when trying to upsell users to more-expensive subscriptions

trans-unit.id: You can be second! That’s pretty great!
trans-unit.source: You can be second! That’s pretty great!
trans-unit.target: Du kan bli nummer två! Det är riktigt bra!
trans-unit.note: Shown to try to encourage the user to rate the app

trans-unit.id: You can be the first! Don’t be shy!
trans-unit.source: You can be the first! Don’t be shy!
trans-unit.target: Du kan vara först! Var inte blyg!
trans-unit.note: Shown to try to encourage the user to rate the app

trans-unit.id: You don't seem to have a subscription. 🤨
trans-unit.source: You don't seem to have a subscription. 🤨
trans-unit.target: Du verkar inte ha en prenumeration. 🤨

trans-unit.id: You have %lld day remaining in your trial.|==|plural.one
trans-unit.source: You have %lld day remaining in your trial.
trans-unit.target: Du har %lld dag kvar på din provperiod.
trans-unit.note: Shown on the "Purchase now" row in Settings if purchasing is unavailable

trans-unit.id: You have %lld day remaining in your trial.|==|plural.other
trans-unit.source: You have %lld days remaining in your trial.
trans-unit.target: Du har %lld dagar kvar på din provperiod.
trans-unit.note: Shown on the "Purchase now" row in Settings if purchasing is unavailable

trans-unit.id: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
trans-unit.source: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
trans-unit.target: Du har osparade ändringar. Är du säker på att du vill kassera dem?

trans-unit.id: You have used all your free searches. Subscribe for unlimited searches.
trans-unit.source: You have used all your free searches. Subscribe for unlimited searches.
trans-unit.target: Du har använt alla dina gratis sökningar. Prenumerera för obegränsade sökningar.

trans-unit.id: You haven't used Callsheet to search for anything! Use the search field to get started.
trans-unit.source: You haven't used Callsheet to search for anything! Use the search field to get started.
trans-unit.target: Du har inte använt Callsheet för att söka efter något än! Använd sökfältet för att komma igång.
Du kanske känner igen dem från
trans-unit.note: Header shown for people

trans-unit.id: You must have a subscription to use the app.
trans-unit.source: You must have a subscription to use the app.
trans-unit.target: Du behöver en prenumeration för att använda appen.
trans-unit.note: Shown in Settings as a subtitle if you haven't purchased the app

trans-unit.id: You must select at least one section to be shown.
trans-unit.source: You must select at least one section to be shown.
trans-unit.target: Du måste välja minst ett avsnitt att visa.
trans-unit.note: Shown as a footer in the Discover Sections view in Persnickety Preferences.
Shown on the "Purchase now" row in Settings if purchasing is unavailable

trans-unit.id: Your access to Callsheet will end on %@.
trans-unit.source: Your access to Callsheet will end on %@.
trans-unit.note: Shown in the subscription status screen @ callsheet://subs

trans-unit.id: Your favorite characters finally get married.
trans-unit.source: Your favorite characters finally get married.
trans-unit.note: A fake summary shown when demonstrating hiding spoilers

trans-unit.id: Your free trial has expired; you must purchase a subscription to use Callsheet.
trans-unit.source: Your free trial has expired; you must purchase a subscription to use Callsheet.
trans-unit.target: Din provperiod has löpt ut; du behöver prenumerera för att använda Callsheet.
trans-unit.note: Shown on the "Purchase now" row in Settings if purchasing is unavailable

trans-unit.id: Your purchase is still pending. Please wait for it to be approved.
trans-unit.source: Your purchase is still pending. Please wait for it to be approved.
trans-unit.target: Ditt köp är fortfarande under behandling. Vänligen vänta på att det godkänns.
trans-unit.note: Shown when a a purchase needs to be approved; likely a child needs a parent to approve it

trans-unit.target: Din prenumeration **kommer inte* att förlängas automatiskt
trans-unit.note: Only shown on a semi-hidden debugging screen
Only shown on a semi-hidden debugging screen

trans-unit.id: Your subscription has expired; you must purchase a new subscription to use Callsheet.
trans-unit.source: Your subscription has expired; you must purchase a new subscription to use Callsheet.
trans-unit.target: Din prenumeration har löpt ut. Du måste starta en ny prenumeration för att använda Callsheet.
trans-unit.note: Shown on the "Purchase now" row in Settings if purchasing is unavailable

trans-unit.id: Your subscription lapsed. To continue using Callsheet, you'll need to start a new subscription.
trans-unit.source: Your subscription lapsed. To continue using Callsheet, you'll need to start a new subscription.
trans-unit.target: Din prenumeration har upphört. Starta en ny för att fortsätta använda Callsheet.
trans-unit.note: Shown in the subscription status screen @ callsheet://subs

trans-unit.id: Your subscription was refunded or otherwise revoked. To continue using Callsheet, you'll need to start a new subscription.
trans-unit.source: Your subscription was refunded or otherwise revoked. To continue using Callsheet, you'll need to start a new subscription.
trans-unit.target: Din prenumeration ångrades eller avbröts på annat sätt. Starta en ny för att fortsätta använda Callsheet.
trans-unit.note: Shown in the subscription status screen @ callsheet://subs
Shown when a cast or crew member died before the release of a piece of media. For example, _(Posthumous; died in 2000 aged 18)_
Shown when a cast or crew member died before the release of a piece of media. For example, _(Posthumous; died in 2000)_
When an actor passed, as well as their age at that time. Part of a larger string. For example "59 years old, died 2020 (age 90)"
cost per period; ie "per month" or "per year"
Noun, a pin/favorite
Shown on the "how long ago was this?" popover when a TV episode was released today.

trans-unit.id: visionOS does not support changing icons yet.
trans-unit.source: visionOS does not support changing icons yet.
trans-unit.target: visionOS saknar stöd för byte av ikoner.
trans-unit.note: Subtitle for the App Icon row in Settings on visionOS
Shown as a header for a year in a person's filmography; "52 - 53 years old
Bundle display name
Bundle name
Copyright (human-readable)

trans-unit.id: A search result from the Search Media action. When provided, Media Type and ID are not needed.
trans-unit.source: A search result from the Search Media action. When provided, Media Type and ID are not needed.
trans-unit.target: Ett sökresultat från åtgärden Sök media. Om det anges behövs inte Medietyp och ID.

trans-unit.id: Choose between providing a result from another Callsheet action, or providing a Media Type & ID.
trans-unit.source: Choose between providing a result from another Callsheet action, or providing a Media Type & ID.
trans-unit.target: Välj mellan att ge ett resultat från en annan Callsheet-åtgärd, eller att ge en Medietyp & ID.

trans-unit.note: Abbreviation for a TV episode; in English, short for "Episode".
Gender for a person that identifies as female

trans-unit.id: Fetches details about a movie, TV show, or person from TMDB.
trans-unit.source: Fetches details about a movie, TV show, or person from TMDB.
trans-unit.target: Hämtar information om en film, TV-serie eller person från TMDB.

trans-unit.id: Fetches videos (trailers, teasers, clips, etc.) for a movie or TV show from TMDB. Returns a list of video results, each with a name, type, and URL.
trans-unit.source: Fetches videos (trailers, teasers, clips, etc.) for a movie or TV show from TMDB. Returns a list of video results, each with a name, type, and URL.
trans-unit.target: Hämtar videor (trailers, teasers, klipp osv.) för en film eller TV-serie från TMDB. Returnerar en lista med videoresultat, var och en med namn, typ och URL.

trans-unit.note: Gender for a person that identifies as male
Crew search prompt; I'll replace "%@" with the name of the media in question, so for the translation, please include "%@" where appropriate.
Cast search prompt; I'll replace "%@" with the name of the media in question, so for the translation, please include "%@" where appropriate.
Gender for a person that identifies as neither male nor female.

trans-unit.id: Open the list of your pinned items
trans-unit.source: Open the list of your pinned items
trans-unit.target: Öppna listan över dina fästa objekt

trans-unit.id: Opens Callsheet and repeats the most recent search.
trans-unit.source: Opens Callsheet and repeats the most recent search.
trans-unit.target: Öppnar Callsheet och upprepar den senaste sökningen.

trans-unit.id: Opens Callsheet and starts a new, blank, search.
trans-unit.source: Opens Callsheet and starts a new, blank, search.
trans-unit.target: Öppnar Callsheet och startar en ny, tom sökning.

trans-unit.id: Opens Callsheet to the list of your pinned items
trans-unit.source: Opens Callsheet to the list of your pinned items
trans-unit.target: Öppnar Callsheet till listan över dina fästa objekt

trans-unit.id: Perform your most recent search in Callsheet
trans-unit.source: Perform your most recent search in Callsheet
trans-unit.target: Utför din senaste sökning i Callsheet

trans-unit.note: Noun, a pin/favorite
Abbreviation for a TV season; in English, short for "Season".

trans-unit.id: Searches TMDB for movies, TV shows, and people matching the given query. Returns up to 20 results, each containing a TMDB ID, title, and media type.
trans-unit.source: Searches TMDB for movies, TV shows, and people matching the given query. Returns up to 20 results, each containing a TMDB ID, title, and media type.
trans-unit.target: Söker på TMDB efter filmer, TV-serier och personer som matchar den givna sökningen. Returnerar upp till 20 resultat, var och en med ett TMDB-ID, titel och medietyp.

trans-unit.id: Select between a movie or TV show. Persons do not have videos.
trans-unit.source: Select between a movie or TV show. Persons do not have videos.
trans-unit.target: Välj mellan en film eller TV-serie. Personer har inte videor.

trans-unit.id: Select between a movie, TV show, or person. When provided, you must also provide an ID, but a Result is not needed.
trans-unit.source: Select between a movie, TV show, or person. When provided, you must also provide an ID, but a Result is not needed.
trans-unit.target: Välj mellan en film, TV-serie eller person. Om det anges måste du också ange ett ID, men ett Resultat behövs inte.

trans-unit.id: Shows one or more of your most recent pinned items
trans-unit.source: Shows one or more of your most recent pinned items
trans-unit.target: Visar en eller flera av dina senaste favoriter

trans-unit.id: Start a new search in Callsheet
trans-unit.source: Start a new search in Callsheet
trans-unit.target: Starta en ny sökning i Callsheet

trans-unit.id: Starts a new Search within Callsheet.
trans-unit.source: Starts a new Search within Callsheet.
trans-unit.target: Startar en ny sökning i Callsheet

trans-unit.id: The identifier for this media item. When provided, you must also provide a Media Type, but a Result is not needed.
trans-unit.source: The identifier for this media item. When provided, you must also provide a Media Type, but a Result is not needed.
trans-unit.target: Identifieraren för det här mediaobjektet. Om det anges måste du också ange en Medietyp, men ett Resultat behövs inte.

trans-unit.id: The TMDB identifier for this media item.
trans-unit.source: The TMDB identifier for this media item.

trans-unit.id: The search term to look up on TMDB.
trans-unit.source: The search term to look up on TMDB.
trans-unit.target: Sökordet att söka upp på TMDB.

trans-unit.note: Crew search prompt in the context of a single person (not a movie/show/etc)
Cast search prompt in the context of a single person (not a movie/show/etc)
Main search prompt on the bottom bar!
Search prompt when viewing a person's entire (cast & crew) filmography
An unknown gender
Noun, a pin/favorite
